name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-powerautomate-approvals
title: Power Automate Approvals
shortDescription: The Power Automate Approvals web part is a SharePoint Framework (SPFx) solution that demonstrates how to consume the Microsoft Graph Approvals API (beta) using the native MSGraphClientV3 HTTP client. It renders a full approvals dashboard - approvals waiting on you, requests you've raised, and their history - with a per-item detail panel showing an activity timeline built from approver responses and reassignment history.
longDescription: The Power Automate Approvals web part is a SharePoint Framework (SPFx) solution that demonstrates how to consume the Microsoft Graph Approvals API (beta) using the native MSGraphClientV3 HTTP client. It renders a full approvals dashboard - approvals waiting on you, requests you've raised, and their history - with a per-item detail panel showing an activity timeline built from approver responses and reassignment history.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
